data.reasoningText:
The user is asking about how to make file system operations (File.WriteAllText, File.ReadAllText, Directory.Exists) testable in their .NET project. This is a design/architecture question, not a code change request.

The standard approach is to introduce an abstraction (interface) for file system operations, then use dependency injection so you can swap in a mock/fake implementation during testing.
